topic: Digital Health and Remote Patient Monitoring

primary_sources.name: CMS Innovation Center Remote Patient Monitoring Guidelines
primary_sources.relevance: Covers reimbursement and implementation of RPM for kidney disease patients

primary_sources.name: Digital Health Technologies for Kidney Disease: A Systematic Review
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive review of digital health interventions in nephrology

primary_sources.name: Telehealth and Remote Monitoring in Dialysis Care: Clinical Practice Guidelines
primary_sources.relevance: Specific guidance on telehealth implementation for dialysis patients

secondary_sources.name: Remote Patient Monitoring in Chronic Kidney Disease: A Narrative Review
secondary_sources.relevance: Reviews evidence for RPM effectiveness in CKD management

secondary_sources.name: Digital Health Innovation in Nephrology
secondary_sources.organization: Journal of the American Society of Nephrology
secondary_sources.relevance: Discusses emerging digital technologies and their applications in kidney care

gaps: Limited KDIGO-specific guidelines on digital health integration
Evolving regulatory landscape for patient-generated health data
Standardization of remote monitoring protocols across different CKD stages
